name: myminicode
description: A minimal terminal coding agent powered by an LLM.

scripts.check: tsx src/tools.check.ts && tsx src/context.check.ts && tsx src/permissions.check.ts && tsx src/sandbox.check.ts && tsx src/diff.check.ts && tsx src/md.check.ts && tsx src/format.check.ts && tsx src/memory.check.ts && tsx src/spawn_agent.check.ts && tsx src/provider.check.ts && tsx src/images.check.ts && tsx src/workspace.check.ts && tsx src/skills.check.ts && tsx src/debug_mode.check.ts && tsx src/eval.check.ts
scripts.prepublishOnly: npm run check && npm run build
